title: Railroads reach agreement to create new direct connection and corridor linking Mexico, Texas and the U.S. Southeast
text: CALGARY, AB and JACKSONVILLE, Fla. , June 28, 2023 /PRNewswire/ - Canadian Pacific Kansas City (TSX: CP) (NYSE: CP) (CPKC), CSX Corporation (NASDAQ: CSX) (CSX) and Genesee & Wyoming Inc. (G&W) today announced they have reached agreements that when completed will create a new direct CPKC-CSX interchange connection in Alabama.

title: CSX Announces Date for Second Quarter Earnings Release and Earnings Call
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., June 27, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) will release second quarter financial and operating results after the market close on Thursday, July 20, 2023. This will be followed by a conference call and live webcast hosted by the company's management team at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time.

title: Rail Stocks Have Had a Rough Ride. Why the Catch-Up May Be Here.
text: Evercore ISI's Jonathan Chappell argues that by 2024 the major rails should be outperforming. That includes even Norfolk Southern, with its derailment issues.

title: CPKC and CSX announce planned collaboration to develop additional hydrogen locomotives
text: CALGARY, AB and JACKSONVILLE, Fla. , June 22, 2023 /PRNewswire/ - Canadian Pacific Kansas City (TSX: CP) (NYSE: CP) (CPKC) and CSX Corporation (NASDAQ: CSX) (CSX) today announced their intent to enter into a joint venture for the building and deployment of hydrogen locomotive conversion kits for diesel electric locomotives.

title: CSX Launches Select Site Online Property Search Tool to Assist Growing Companies, Communities
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., June 15, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX (NASDAQ: CSX) has launched a new online site selection tool to assist growing companies in their search for premium rail-served properties and communities competing for economic development projects.

title: CSX Corporation: The Rail Industry Is Benefiting From Reshoring
text: CSX Corporation, a US transportation company, is poised to benefit from the reshoring of manufacturing and increased demand for rail transportation services. The company is expanding its portfolio, targeting 20 new sites and over 500 projects to establish itself as the primary rail company in the US. CSX's financials show room for improvement, but the company is considered a buy at its current price due to its growth potential and strong market position.

title: CSX Announces $5 Million Donation to the B&O Railroad Museum to Launch a Transformation of the Campus in Southwest Baltimore
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., June 08, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- CSX Corp. (NASDAQ: CSX) today announced a gift of $5 million to the Baltimore and Ohio (B&O) Railroad Museum in Baltimore, MD towards the museum's $30 million capital campaign in anticipation of the B&O railroad's bicentennial anniversary in 2027.

title: CSX Corporation (CSX) UBS Global Industrials and Transportation Conference Transcript

title: CSX, Calumet, and 3 Other Investments Pros Say Will Benefit From Underappreciated Trends
text: Five pros share investment picks based on themes ranging from nearshoring to clean energy.
